title: Public Notice (09.07.2024) to Directors of LC’s (PDF)
text:
Port Vila
PUBLIC NOTICE Companies House
Rue Bouganville
PMB 9023, Port Vila
9 July 2024
Efate, Vanuatu
TO ALL DIRECTORS OF LOCAL COMPANIES Luganville
Millenium Building
PMB 9005, Luganville
RE: ULTIMATE BENEFICIAL OWNER(S) – LOCAL COMPANIES
Santo, Vanuatu
Torba
c/o Torba Provincial
Starting on 15 July 2024 all new application for incorporation of local companies
Government Council
must provide the Ultimate Beneficial Owner(s) details and documents
Sola, Banks, Vanuatu
requested as outlined in the Ultimate Beneficial Owner(s) form to the Registrar of
Companies for review. Penama
c/o Vanuatu Post
Saratamata
We require the information about Ultimate Beneficial Owner(s) of local companies East Ambae, Vanuatu
provided to us from 15 July 2024 and there on.
Malampa
c/o Malampa Provincial
The Ultimate Beneficial Owner(s) form can be downloaded from the www.vfsc.vu
Government Council
website. Please use one form per ultimate beneficial owner. PO Box 22, Lakatoro
Malekula, Vanuatu
Please do not hesitate to contact Willie Vutigele Andre on wvandre@vfsc.vu of this
Tafea
office, if you have any queries.
c/o Tafea Provincial
Government Council
PO Box 28, Lenakel
Tanna, Vanuatu
Joshua Tari
Acting Commissioner
www.vfsc.vu info@vfsc.vu
IMPORTANT NOTE: This letter may be received only by the named addressee and anyone authorised by the named addressee. It is
confidential and contains material which is the subject of legal prof essional privilege and/or public interest privilege. Unauthorised
retention, publication, forwarding or other use of this letter may lead to civil or criminal liability. If you have received this letter in
error the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission requests that you immediately inform us and delete it.

Port Vila
AVIS PUBLIC Companies House
Rue Bouganville
PMB 9023, Port Vila
Efate, Vanuatu
9 juillet 2024
Luganville
À TOUS LES DIRECTEURS D'ENTREPRISES LOCALES Millenium Building
PMB 9005, Luganville
Santo, Vanuatu
OBJET : BÉNÉFICIAIRE(S) EFFECTIF(S) ULTIME(S) - ENTREPRISES
LOCALES Torba
c/o Torba Provincial
Government Council
Sola, Banks, Vanuatu
À partir du 15 juillet 2024, toutes les nouvelles demandes de constitution
d'entreprises locales devront fournir les détails sur le(s) bénéficiaire(s) effectif(s) Penama
ultime(s) ainsi que les documents requis, comme indiqué dans le formulaire « c/o Vanuatu Post
Saratamata
Bénéficiaire(s) effectif(s) ultime(s) », au Registraire des Entreprises pour examen.
East Ambae, Vanuatu
Nous exigeons que les informations sur le(s) bénéficiaire(s) effectif(s) ultime(s) des
Malampa
entreprises locales nous soient fournies à partir du 15 juillet 2024. c/o Malampa Provincial
Government Council
Le formulaire relatif au(x) bénéficiaire(s) effectif(s) final(s) peut être téléchargé via PO Box 22, Lakatoro
le site web de la Commission des services financiers de Vanuatu : www.vfsc.vu. Malekula, Vanuatu
Veuillez compléter un formulaire par bénéficiaire effectif ultime.
Tafea
c/o Tafea Provincial
Pour tout renseignement complémentaire, n’hésitez pas à contacter Willie Vutigele Government Council
Andre à l’adresse e-mail suivante wvandre@vfsc.vu PO Box 28, Lenakel
Tanna, Vanuatu
Joshua Tari
Commissaire par intérim
www.vfsc.vu info@vfsc.vu
IMPORTANT NOTE: This letter may be received only by the named addressee and anyone authorised by the named addressee. It is
confidential and contains material which is the subject of legal prof essional privilege and/or public interest privilege. Unauthorised
retention, publication, forwarding or other use of this letter may lead to civil or criminal liability. If you have received this letter in
error the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission requests that you immediately inform us and delete it.

Port Vila
PABLIK NOTIS Companies House
Rue Bouganville
PMB 9023, Port Vila
9 Julae 2024
Efate, Vanuatu
I GO LONG EVRI DAEREKTA BLONG OLGETA LOKOL KAMPANI Luganville
Millenium Building
PMB 9005, Luganville
RE: ULTIMATE BENEFICIAL OWNER (S) – OLGETA LOKOL KAMPANI
Santo, Vanuatu
Torba
c/o Torba Provincial
Stat long namba 15 Julae 2024, evri niufala aplikesen blong inkoperesen blong
Government Council
olgeta lokol kampani, oli mas givim olgeta Ultimate Beneficial Owner diteil mo
Sola, Banks, Vanuatu
dokumen olsem we hemi stap long fom blong Ultimate Beneficial Owner i kam
long Rejista blong mekem riviu long olgeta kampani. Penama
c/o Vanuatu Post
Hemi wan rikwaemen blong mifala i mas kasem infomesen blong olgeta Ultimate Saratamata
Beneficial Owner blong olgeta lokol kampani stat long namba 15 Julae 2024 i go. East Ambae, Vanuatu
Malampa
Yu save daonlodem fom blong Ultimate Beneficial Owner i stap long websaed
c/o Malampa Provincial
www.vfsc.vu. Plis taem yu fulumap fom, bae wanwan ultimate beneficial owner i
Government Council
yusum wan fom. PO Box 22, Lakatoro
Malekula, Vanuatu
Plis kontaktem Willie Vutigele Andre long wvandre@vfsc.vu sipos we yu wantem
Tafea
kasem moa infomesen.
c/o Tafea Provincial
Government Council
PO Box 28, Lenakel
Tanna, Vanuatu
Joshua Tari
Akting Komisina
www.vfsc.vu info@vfsc.vu
IMPORTANT NOTE: This letter may be received only by the named addressee and anyone authorised by the named addressee. It is
confidential and contains material which is the subject of legal prof essional privilege and/or public interest privilege. Unauthorised
retention, publication, forwarding or other use of this letter may lead to civil or criminal liability. If you have received this letter in
error the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission requests that you immediately inform us and delete it.
